Thanks for contributing to Webisters! Please fill in the sections below.
Keep the pull request focused; open separate PRs for unrelated changes.
-->

## Summary

<!-- What does this PR do and why? -->

## Related issues

<!-- Link issues this PR addresses, e.g. "Fixes #12" or "Refs #34". -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that changes existing behavior)
- [ ] Documentation only
- [ ] Refactor / internal change

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests pass locally (`vendor/bin/phpunit`)
- [ ] Coding style passes (`vendor/bin/php-cs-fixer fix --dry-run --diff`)
- [ ] I added or updated tests where practical
- [ ] I updated documentation where needed
- [ ] The standard file header is present on any new files

## Notes for reviewers

<!-- Anything reviewers should focus on, screenshots, or follow-ups. -->
